titleStmt.title: SII 41.144: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 144. (A.R. No. 143 of 1905.) Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vikritisvara temple at Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr.

p.hi: Koṅgu ruler (?) Kōṉērinmaikoṇḍāṉ = c. 12-13th century A.D.

summary.p: The king assigned the entire tax revenue of Tiruveñjamākkūḍal to Āḷuḍaiyār temple in the same village. The officers Vilāḍattaraiyaṉ and Kāḍuveṭṭi signed the document. Also two vēṭṭuva community members are found as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . konerimaikoṇṭāṉ Āḷuṭaiyār tiruveñcamākkūṭal
Āḷuṭaiyār tēvakaṉmikaḷukku namolai kuṭutta paricāvatu tiruveñcamākkūṭal Āḷuṭaiyā
ṟku tiruveñcamākkūṭalaik kuṭuttom Ivūrk kuḷakkaṭṭukaḷum lceṭṭikuḷammu
aṇaiaṭaiccu vāykkālāl pāñcu viḷaiyakkaṭavatuvum melkaraiyil neṭuṅ kuḻiyilaṇaiyāl
paṭṭa viḷaivatuvum telappāṭikku kiḻakkum nākaṉpaḷḷiyil Ilantai maṭaiyum kalmā
ṭattukku teṟkkum virapāṇṭiyaṉ kiṇaṟṟukku meṟkkum parapputtuṟaikku vaṭakkum
Iṉṉāṉ kellaik kuṭpaṭṭa puṟṟun teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭi Āmaitavaḻiyum meṉokkiya
maramum kiḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟum Āḷuṭaiyār tiruveñcamāk kūṭaluṭaiyāṟku
kuṭuttom Ivvūrāluḷḷa Iṟai puravu ciṟṟāyam Elavai Ukavai maṟṟum Eppayaṟ
paṭṭutuvum manṟupāṭu teṇṭa kuṟṟamum kaṟṟup puṟapokā muṟṟuṭṭum Āḷuṭaiyā
r tiruveñcamakkūṭaluṭaiyā(r)ṟku kuṭuttom nantamāraṉārum pāṟppaṭuttu
kuṭukka Ippaṭikku Ivolaiyil nam Eḻuttu Iṭṭu kuṭuttom Ippaṭi cantirā
tittavaṟ celvatāka cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭikoḷka .§
Ippaṭikku Ivai vilāṭattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttuippaṭikku kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu
veṭṭuvaril kaṟaṭiciṟuvan ciṟuvaṉāna melṉāṭṭaraiyaṉum veṇikoccan periyā
kkūṭal pullaiveṭṭuvaril ceṅkovaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 41.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
